personal_projects.title: Student Services Product Design Exploration
personal_projects.content: Product design exploration focused on improving access to university student services through a centralized mobile experience. The project included user flows, interface design, information architecture, and high-fidelity prototyping for academic management workflows.

personal_projects.title: Personal Website
personal_projects.content: Personal portfolio platform designed to present engineering case studies, technical explorations, and selected product-oriented work. The site was built with a focus on responsive layouts, reusable UI components, multilingual content architecture, and smooth interactive transitions using React, Next.js, and Framer Motion.
